viral_angle: The alien world we haven't explored yet.
curiosity_gap: Why we know more about the moon than the bottom of our own oceans.
hook: Did you know there's an alien world right here on Earth?
core_message: The deep ocean holds secrets crucial to our planet's future.

viral_angle: The hidden reason the Roman Empire actually fell.
curiosity_gap: Why it wasn't just barbarians that destroyed Rome.
hook: Rome didn't fall because of invaders. It fell from within.
core_message: Economic collapse and political instability ruined the greatest empire.
